top_categories.workout_context: 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse's rolling hills forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 62 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
When someone attacks on rolling hills, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse's rolling hills rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
At 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse. Train it until it feels boring.
2-minute all-out efforts on rolling hills. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
62 miles on rolling hills burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
Smooth pedaling at 62 miles saves muscle. Bad technique at mile 10 is invisible. At mile 80 it's a cramp.
Varied gradients on rolling hills demand climbing versatility. Sit the shallow stuff, stand the steep stuff, switch without thinking.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse's rolling hills actually does to you.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse’s 62 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Highly technical terrain at 3RIDES Gran Fondo Südliche Weinstrasse demands practice on similar surfaces. Ride rolling hills at race-day cadence weekly. Practice cornering, descending, and power delivery on unstable surfaces. Dial in tire pressure before race week — 5 PSI wrong costs you 15+ minutes over 62 miles.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and VO2max to prepare you for 62 miles of rolling hills in Porte des Vins Allemands (German Wine Gate), Schweigen-Rechtenbach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.
